title: codec.py: BitReader.read() is O(n) per bit, could use byte-aligned fast path
description:
src/lichen/schc/codec.py:97-103 reads bits one at a time in a loop. For 128-bit IPv6 addresses, this means 128 loop iterations per field.

A byte-aligned fast path or reading bytes at a time would be more efficient. Not critical since SCHC packets are small, but the per-bit loop is avoidable.
close_reason: Acceptable - SCHC residues are typically <200 bits. Per-bit loop is simple and correct. Optimize when profiling shows bottleneck.
